channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Michelle Obama 'sends her thoughts and prayers' while absent from Carter's funeral
item.description: Michelle Obama wasn't among the mourners attending former President Carter's funeral service in Washington, but she says she's thinking of and praying for "everyone who loved and learned" from the late commander in chief.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, NewsNation

item.title: Trump to be sentenced in hush money case, days before return to White House
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is facing sentencing for his New York hush money conviction after the nation's highest court refused to intervene.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Sisak, Jennifer Peltz And Jake Offenhartz, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump hosts Republican governors in Florida and talks anew about Greenland and drones
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump hosted 22 of the nation's 27 Republican governors for dinner at his Florida club on Thursday night, looking to help drive the agenda in conservative-run states after he takes office in 11 days. Montana Gov.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump names latest Cabinet picks as Jan. 20 inauguration nears
item.description: President-elect Trump tapped Christine Toretti as ambassador to Sweden and Leo Terrell as senior counsel to the assistant attorney general for civil rights in the Department of Justice.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Biden administration succeeds in temporarily blocking a plea deal for accused 9/11 mastermind
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Biden administration succeeded Thursday in temporarily blocking accused 9/11 mastermind Khalid Sheikh Mohammed from entering a guilty plea in a deal that would spare him the risk of execution for al-Qaida’s Sept. 11, 2001, attacks.
item.dc:creator: ELLEN KNICKMEYER and JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump says he respects Supreme Court's decision to deny his request to stop sentencing, vows to appeal
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump said he respects the Supreme Court’s decision to deny his request to stop his sentencing in New York v. Trump from moving forward, but said Thursday night he will appeal, while stressing that “lawfare" has been an “attack on the Republican Party.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump’s bid to delay sentencing in his New York hush money case
item.description: A divided Supreme Court on Thursday rejected President-elect Donald Trump’s bid to delay his sentencing in his hush money case in New York.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, MICHAEL HILL and MICHAEL R. SISAK Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Supreme Court refuses Trump’s request to block Friday’s criminal sentencing
item.description: The Supreme Court in a 5-4 decision on Thursday refused President-elect Trump’s request to halt his criminal sentencing, now just hours away, closing off Trump’s last remaining pathway to avoid receiving his punishment for his 34-count felony conviction in New York.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Supreme Court denies Trump attempt to stop sentencing in New York v. Trump
item.description: The United States Supreme Court has denied President-elect Trump's petition to block his Friday sentencing in New York v. Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pinellas residents struggle with permit delays, seek accountability
item.description: Many Pinellas County residents have been displaced from their homes since Hurricane Helene hit more than 100 days ago. Some have nowhere else to go, forcing them to stay in damaged and unfinished homes until the county gives them the permits to rebuild.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The Memo: Trump-Newsom feud ramps up as Los Angeles fires rage on
item.description: The feud between President-elect Trump and California Gov. Gavin Newsom (D) is hitting new peaks of intensity as wildfires rage on in Los Angeles. Trump has called on Newsom to resign, while the governor has hit back at Trump for politicizing the disaster.
item.dc:creator: Niall Stanage, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Homeless mental health and affordability headline NYC mayor’s State of the City address
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Mayor Eric Adams on Thursday laid out an ambitious agenda for 2025 while fighting for his political life. His State of the City address was the last of his first term in office as he faces a tough reelection battle.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Sen. J.D. Vance to resign ahead of vice presidential inauguration
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) -- U.S. Sen. J.D. Vance will resign from his seat in Congress' upper chamber on Thursday ahead of his inauguration as vice president to President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Natalie Fahmy, NewsNation

item.title: Pennsylvania GOP Rep. Meuser considering run for governor
item.description: Rep. Dan Meuser (R-Pa.) signaled he is seriously considering challenging Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro (D) for his post in 2026. “I’m considering it,” Meuser told The Hill on Thursday. “I mean if I get in it’s because I think I can win and that means beating the incumbent which is Josh Shapiro.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Politics Newsletter: Handshakes of Old Partners
item.description: Welcome to the Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump transition, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LA suburb doubles down on sanctuary city policies as neighboring city burns
item.description: As whole neighborhoods in Los Angeles burn to the ground, city council members in nearby Long Beach, California, voted to double down on their sanctuary city policies, vowing to resist President-elect Donald Trump’s plans for mass deportations.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Powerful fire union that was neutral in 2024 backs Noem for DHS as California wildfires rage
item.description: The International Association of Firefighters endorsed South Dakota Gov. Kristi Noem for DHS secretary as California fires rage, which notably follows its neutral 2024 presidential position.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris, Emhoff appear to ignore Trump, Obama as outgoing veep grimaces at presidential banter
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris and President-elect Donald Trump apparently did not acknowledge each other at the Washington National Cathedral during Jimmy Carter's state funeral.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Some notable quotes from Jimmy Carter's funeral
item.description: Jimmy Carter was remembered at his funeral Thursday at Washington National Cathedral as a man of “character” and “something of a miracle” with “prophetic” vision.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about Trump and his keen interest in Greenland
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has said multiple times that the U.S. should buy Greenland, an autonomous territory of Denmark. The sparsely populated island is geopolitically important and mineral-rich.
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster, MPR News

item.title: Trump: 'All hell will break out' if Hamas hostages not released by inauguration
item.description: "It will not be good for Hamas, and it will not be good, frankly, for anyone," Trump said during a press conference at his Mar-a-Lago residence. "All hell will break out. I don't have to say any more, but that's what it is.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, Fox 5

item.title: California governor proposes $322B budget with no deficit after two years of shortfalls
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom has proposed a $322 billion budget without a deficit, a welcome change after two years of significant budget shortfalls in the nation's most populous state.
item.dc:creator: Tran Nguyen, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Biden creates 2 new national monuments, setting a conservation record
item.description: The White House says President Joe Biden has now protected a total of 674 million acres of lands and waters — a record for any administration. This includes two new national monuments in California.
item.dc:creator: Deepa Shivaram, MPR News

item.title: U.K. leader Starmer slams ‘lies and misinformation’ after attacks from Elon Musk
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer on Monday condemned "lies and misinformation" that he said are undermining U.K. democracy, in response to a barrage of attacks on his government from Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump Jr. plans Greenland visit after father stirs controversy
item.description: Donald Trump Jr. is planning to head to Greenland for a day-long trip just weeks after his father, President-elect Trump, said U.S. ownership of the Danish territory "is an absolute necessity.
item.dc:creator: Sarakshi Rai, Fox 5

item.title: Politicians reflect on January 6, shifting landscape of power transitions
item.description: The 2024 Presidential Election results have been officially certified by members of Congress. While the session typically happens without fanfare, there was extra security in place this time.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump pitches 'merged' US, Canada after Trudeau resignation announcement
item.description: After Trudeau’s announcement Monday, Trump touted the idea that many Canadians would “LOVE” the idea of being the "51st State" of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Child tax credit expansion proposed: What it means for New Yorkers
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – A proposal to expand New York's child tax credit would give families more money per child, Gov. Kathy Hochul announced on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Canadian PM Justin Trudeau resigns
item.description: Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau announced his resignation Monday in the face of rising discontent over his leadership, and after the abrupt departure of his finance minister signaled growing turmoil within his government.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Congress certifies Trump's election win despite weather threat
item.description: Congress certified President-elect Donald Trump’s election win on Monday as Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) plowed ahead with the vote despite a snowstorm set to hit Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, Fox 5

item.title: Judge denies Jan. 6 rioter’s bid to attend Trump inauguration
item.description: A U.S. District Judge denied a Jan. 6 rioter’s request to attend President-elect Trump's inauguration later this month, citing concerns over the Capitol insurrection which incited hours of chaos and violence in the nation’s capital.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Carter's state funeral starts Saturday. Here is what to know
item.description: Six days of funeral observances for former President Jimmy Carter begin Saturday in Georgia, where he died on Dec. 29 at the age of 100.
item.dc:creator: Bill Barrow, WFLA, NBC
